channel.title: Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: html5seo
item.description: An HTML5 template containing metadata described by: Twitter card, Facebook’s Open Graph Protocol, Google’s JSON+LD, and HTML5.

item.title: hopfield_tests
item.description: These Python scripts can be used to test the recall effectiveness of Hopfield Networks. A sample dataset composed of the Walsh vectors, an orthogonal system is included by default.

item.title: git-quick-stats
item.description: A personal fork of ▁▅▆▃▅ Git quick statistics is a simple and efficient way to access various statistics in git repository.

item.title: emails
item.description: A machine learning project for classifying emails into spam and ham. Uses C for preprocessing emails, Python for parsing and extracting low-level features of emails, and a few lines of Matlab for running several classic classifiers.

item.title: cv-composer
item.description: Command-line based computer vision algorithms showcase. Uses the OpenCV C++ library.

item.title: cuda-fft
item.description: Yet another FFT implementation in CUDA. Includes benchmarks using simple data for comparing different implementations.

item.title: CORE
item.description: Implementation of SPJ’s Tutorial Core compilers in modern Haskell (unfinished)

item.title: coolnoise
item.description: Parser and generator for programs written in the Classroom Object-Oriented Language. Eases testing of lexer and parser.

item.title: cheatsheets
item.description: Toolkit for converting notes into compact PDFs suitable for quick reference sheets, cheatsheets, cribsheets, etc. Notes can be written in markdown, are rendered to PDF by Pandoc.

item.title: You, Node.js Development, and Docker
item.description: My take on developing Node.js projects using Docker.

item.title: Configuration files
item.description: My portable, personal, developer-centric setup for common Linux and MacOS tools.

item.title: hugo-hugo-coder
item.description: A minimalist blog theme for hugo with roguh’s edits

item.title: Some General Cybersecurity Advice
item.description: A mishmash of what could be common-sense security tips and other ideas for preventing security leaks on personal devices.

item.title: Security News
item.description: Two of my cybersecurity courses at NMT asked students to write reports on recent security news. This continues to be a hobby of mine. When Trump Phones Friends, the Chinese and the Russians Listen and Learn - A solar observatory in New Mexico is evacuated for a week and the FBI is in Inside the NSA's War on Internet Security - SPIEGEL ONLINE How I Socially Engineer Myself Into High Security Facilities - Motherboard The Worst Cybersecurity Breaches of 2018 So Far | WIRED https://krebsonsecurity.

item.title: ansible-fwknop
item.description: Ansible role that secures ports on your server from unauthorized access using fwknop, an improved port knocking utility.

item.title: Best Websites
item.description: In order, as determined by the knowledge graph and me: https://github.com/resir014/thebestmotherfuckingwebsite.co https://motherfuckingwebsite.com/ https://thebestmotherfucking.website/ http://bettermotherfuckingwebsite.com/ https://evenbettermotherfucking.website/ https://perfectmotherfuckingwebsite.com/ https://thebestmotherfuckingwebsite.co/

item.title: Aliases
item.description: My full name is Hugo Omar Rivera Calzadillas. I prefer the Spanish pronunciation oo-GOH. I use Hugo O Rivera for conciseness. I use Hugo Omar Rivera, and Hugo O Rivera-Calzadillas because many institutions are unaware of or unwilling to accommodate the rich diversity of personal names around the world. roguh (ro-KOO) is my screen name. The name is inspired by Rokurōta Makabe, a character in one of my favorite movies.

item.title: Contact Information
item.description: hugo аt roguh.com rivera.hugo2319 аt gmail.com text or call +1 (774) 354-9367 linkedin.com/in/hugoorivera

item.title: POC||GTFO mirrors
item.description: https://defuse.ca/pocorgtfo.htm https://www.alchemistowl.org/pocorgtfo/ https://greatscottgadgets.com/pocorgtfo/ https://www.geoffchappell.com/pocorgtfo/index.htm https://www.sultanik.com/pocorgtfo/ https://www.rahielkasim.com/pocorgtfo/ https://dustri.org/pocorgtfo/ http://www.the-collective.net/pocorgtfo/ http://openwall.info/wiki/people/solar/pocorgtfo http://ai4qr.com/pocorgtfo/ Github https://github.com/filcab/pocorgtfo https://github.com/tylert/pocorgtfo https://tylert.github.io/pocorgtfo https://github.com/fdiskyou/Zines/tree/master/pocorgtfo IPFS https://ipfs.io/ipfs/QmSYPTz9Eg2HyStSzVtiyUzehPDT1J9LEenBqt3TpFLRrD https://ipfs.io/ipfs/QmcLWK1R4KK7mDwSDwAm5Ny5gs185vgMpXbnbWbxp44Dvm ipfs pin add QmcLWK1R4KK7mDwSDwAm5Ny5gs185vgMpXbnbWbxp44Dvm Checksums Check using sha256sum -c sha256sums or md5sum -c md5sums md5sums: MD5 (pocorgtfo00.pdf) = d74949bc9ca4dc265dbf2ff540fe6837 MD5 (pocorgtfo01.pdf) = 151bb48f35895ba75e3c5f4b89b1ba87 MD5 (pocorgtfo02.pdf) = 39e5658e24a08e786955af1f4d7e2852 MD5 (pocorgtfo03.pdf) = b90e36dbd5f192723c84c7ad002a616e MD5 (pocorgtfo04.pdf) = 895598b7946d5b11adedad2e574b2b24 MD5 (pocorgtfo05.pdf) = 74a17e1cb87cbf1dc31eebe5c7aea639 MD5 (pocorgtfo06.pdf) = 02222f78842741c8b74237abe72f4015 MD5 (pocorgtfo07.pdf) = 1cb67f33d8b1a63bf4f729ddf328eba3 MD5 (pocorgtfo08.

item.title: Darkrose and Diamond
item.description: Darkrose and Diamond A Boat Song from West Havnor Where my love is going There will I go. Where his boat is rowing I will row. We will laugh together, Together we will cry. If he lives I will live, If he dies I die. Where my love is going There will I go. Where his boat is rowing I will row. IN THE WEST OF HAVNOR, among hills forested with oak and chestnut, is the town of Glade.
roguh i3empty title: i3empty date: 2019-09-11T20:22:19Z summary: Quickly switch to a new numbered workspace. Utility for the i3 window manager. github.com/roguh/roguh
roguh lithe title: lithe date: 2019-09-11T20:22:32Z summary: A lightweight Hugo theme. github.com/roguh/roguh

roguh nodejs-api-starter title: nodejs-api-starter date: 2019-09-11T20:24:21Z summary: Boilerplate and tooling for authoring data API backends with Node.js and GraphQL. A personal fork. github.com/roguh/roguh https://reactstarter.com/nodejs
roguh ocaml-lox title: ocaml-lox date: 2019-09-11T20:24:46Z summary: Lox interpreter written in OCaml. github.com/roguh/roguh https://craftinginterpreters.com
roguh ocaml-parsing title: ocaml-parsing date: 2018-09-17T21:47:28Z summary: Boilerplate code for writing parsers in OCaml using Menhir + sedlex github.com/roguh/roguh
roguh pandoc-resume title: pandoc-resume date: 2019-02-19T14:12:36Z summary: Write a résumé in markdown and convert to PDF, DOCX, and HTML. github.com/roguh/roguh

roguh passwordstore-noise-generator title: passwordstore-noise-generator date: 2019-09-11T20:25:23Z summary: Patches up a possible side-channel in zx2c4’s pass password manager. github.com/roguh/roguh
roguh PhotoFest title: PhotoFest date: 2019-09-11T20:25:50Z summary: PhotoFest is a secure self-hosted flat-file photo collection webapp written in Rust (unfinished) github.com/roguh/roguh

roguh polybar-themer title: polybar-themer date: 2019-09-11T20:27:30Z summary: A theme generator for polybar, a popular status bar for Linux. Uses math and advanced YAML parsing to generate colorful, sensible color schemes. github.com/roguh/roguh https://polybar.github.io/

roguh pympw title: pympw date: 2019-09-11T20:30:24Z summary: A Python implementation of the Master Password algorithm v3 with a nice Linux CLI github.com/roguh/roguh http://www.masterpasswordapp.com/masterpassword-algorithm.pdf

item.title: A brief bio
item.description: Education and career While studying CS at the Santa Fe Community College in NM, I taught myself enough Haskell to write most of a simple compiler for Haskell’s intermediate language Core. I also volunteered as a generalist technician, repairman, and software person at Computer Charity, Inc. in Santa Fe. I studied computer science and mathematics at the majestic New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology where I graduated with high honors.

item.title: Career
item.description: I’m passionate about developing tomorrow’s essential technology. I’ve worked as a fullstack software engineer in the San Francisco Bay Area. Fullstack software engineer I built software that operates directly on EHRs (electronic health records). It is used by doctors and other health practitioners at AgileMD I build software for the Future of Pharmacy Infrastructure at Truepill, “the AWS for pharmacies” backed by Initialized Capital. More See my LinkedIn for current position(s) and more detail.

item.title: New Mexico
item.description: The 47th state in the UNITED STATES OF AMERICA. Known for lowriders, U+1F47Ds, green chile, beautiful wilderness, and Meow Wolf’s House of Eternal Return.

item.title: USHANKA
item.description: the angles cut me when i try to think it feels like thinking through cheese wire there’s no feeling but the no-feeling hurts it’s cold and it hurts the maze is sharp on my mind. the angles cut me when i try to think.
